zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol於1294年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾時，他的父親Gui de Chatillon IV36歲，母親Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol26歲。他於1329年12月與Jeanne de Fiennes結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1344年在法國享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol于1294年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾时，他的父亲Gui de Chatillon IV36岁，母亲Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol26岁。他于1329年12月与Jeanne de Fiennes结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1344年在法国享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol was born in 1294, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Gui de Chatillon IV, was 36 and his mother, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, was 26. He married Jeanne de Fiennes in December 1329. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1344, in France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol est né en 1294, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Gui de Chatillon IV, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Fiennes en décembre 1329. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1344, à France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol 1294 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gui de Chatillon IV 36 und seine Mutter Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol 26. Er hat im Dezember 1329 Jeanne de Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1344 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol è nato il nel 1294 nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Gui de Chatillon IV, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Fiennes nel dicembre 1329. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1344, nel Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Polが1294年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで生まれた時，父Gui de Chatillon IVは36歳，母Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Polは26歳であった。1329年12月にJeanne de Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1344年にフランスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol(이)가 1294년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gui de Chatillon IV(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1329년 12월 Jeanne de Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1344년 프랑스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol nasceu em 1294, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Gui de Chatillon IV, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Fiennes em dezembro de 1329. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1344, em França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol родился в 1294 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Gui de Chatillon IV было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Fiennes декабрь 1329 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1344 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Châtillon Count de St. Pol nació en 1294, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gui de Chatillon IV, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Fiennes en diciembre de 1329. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1344, en Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
